info.name: multi-gateway-payment-api
info.description: Multi-Gateway Payment API — BeTalent API RESTful de pagamentos com múltiplos gateways e fallback automático por prioridade. Inclui autenticação via Bearer token, controle de acesso por roles (ADMIN, MANAGER, FINANCE, USER), CRUD de produtos e usuários, e reembolso de transações pelo gateway de origem. Base URL: [http://localhost:3333/api](http://localhost:3333/api)

item.name: Auth

header.name: cookie
header.info:
The Cookie header is added to send the cookies that are associated with this endpoint.

Use the cookie manager to remove the header or to change the value.

header.name: cache-control
header.info:
Postman added "Cache-Control: no-cache" as a precautionary measure to prevent the server from returning stale response when one makes repeated requests.

You can remove this header in the app settings or enter a new one with a different value.

header.name: postman-token
header.info:
The Postman-Token header appends a random UUID to every outgoing request. Postman adds this header for API developers to better debug requests sent and to ensure separate requests appear distinct to the receiving server.

You can remove this header in the app settings.

header.name: content-type
header.info:
The Content-Type header is added to help the server identify the media type of the request body that is present in this request.

Use the request body tab to control the value or to remove this header.

header.name: content-length
header.info:
The Content-Length header was added to indicate to the server the size of the request body that is added to this request. Server uses this value to parse the request body accurately.

You can remove the header or enter a new one with a different value.

header.name: host
header.info:
The Host header is added to identify the domain name for which a request is being sent to the server. This header is implicitly sent by every HTTP client.

You can remove the header or enter a new one with a different value. It is most likely that without this header, your request will return an HTTP 400 error.

header.name: user-agent
header.info:
The User-Agent header is added to help the server identify Postman as the HTTP requesting application or client.

It is recommended that this header be sent, but you can remove the header or enter a new one with a different value.

header.name: accept
header.info:
The "Accept: */*" header is added to tell the server that Postman can understand and process all forms of response content types.

It is recommended that this header be sent, but you can remove the header or enter a new one with a different value.

header.name: accept-encoding
header.info:
The Accept-Encoding header is added to indicate to the server that Postman HTTP client supports a defined list of content-encoding or compression algorithms as response.

You can remove the header or enter a new one with a different value. Doing that may not accurately render the response within the app.

header.name: connection
header.info:
Postman added the Connection header to indicate the server to keep the underlying network connection open once the current response is received. This allows Postman to reuse the same connection for faster response times in subsequent requests to the same server.

You can remove this header or enter a new one with a different value, such as `Connection: Close` to control this behaviour.

request.description:
- Endpoint público, não requer autenticação.
    
- Cria o usuário com role USER por padrão.
    
- Retorna dados do usuário e token de acesso.
    
- O token deve ser usado nas rotas autenticadas.
    

---

| Request Body | Rules |
| --- | --- |
| `email` | obrigatório, válido e único |
| `password` | obrigatório, entre 8 e 32 caracteres |

---

**200 Ok**

``` json
{
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "email": "usuario@email.com",
    "createdAt": "2025-03-10T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-03-10T00:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "token": "oat_MTg.V2Fnc2Zmb2..."
}

 ```

**422 Validation Error**

``` json
{
  "message": "Validation error",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "email", "message": "The email has already been taken" },
    { "field": "password", "message": "The password must be at least 8 characters" }
  ]
}

 ```

- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Revoga o token de acesso do uruário autenticado
    

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "message": "Logged out"
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}

 ```

item.description:
**Base URL:** `http://localhost:3333/api`

---

Rotas Públicas — não requerem autenticação.

| Método | Rota | Descrição |
| --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/auth/signup` | Cria uma nova conta com role USER |
| POST | `/auth/login` | Autentica e retorna o Bearer token |

Rotas Privadas — requerem `Authorization: Bearer {token}` no header.

| Método | Rota | Descrição |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/auth/profile` | Retorna os dados do usuário autenticado |
| DELETE | `/auth/logout` | Revoga o token do usuário autenticado |

item.name: Users

request.description:
- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Lista todos os usuários cadastrados.
    
- Roles permitidas: ADMIN, MANAGER.
    

---

| Request Body | Rules |
| --- | --- |
| `email` | obrigatório, válido e único |
| `password` | obrigatório, entre 8 e 32 caracteres |
| `role` | obrigatório, enum: ADMIN, MANAGER, FINANCE, USER |

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 51,
      "email": "admin@betalent.com",
      "role": "ADMIN",
      "createdAt": "2026-03-13T17:33:02.000+00:00",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:14:07.000+00:00"
    },
    {
      "id": 53,
      "email": "manager@betalent.com",
      "role": "MANAGER",
      "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:14:07.000+00:00",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:14:07.000+00:00"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidden**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

item.name: Products

request.description:
- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Lista todos os produtos ordenados por nome.
    
- Roles permitidas: ADMIN, MANAGER, FINANCE.
    

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": [
    { "id": 1, "name": "Plano Basic", "amount": 4990, "createdAt": "...", "updatedAt": "..." },
    { "id": 2, "name": "Plano Pro", "amount": 9990, "createdAt": "...", "updatedAt": "..." }
  ]
}

 ```

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidden**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

item.name: Transactions

request.description:
- Endpoint público, não requer autenticação.
    
- Realiza uma compra. Tenta o gateway de maior prioridade e faz fallback automático.
    
- O cliente é criado automaticamente se não existir.
    

---

| Request Body | Rules |
| --- | --- |
| `products` | obrigatório, array com ao menos 1 item |
| `products[].id` | obrigatório, ID de produto existente |
| `products[].quantity` | obrigatório, inteiro positivo |
| `client.name` | obrigatório |
| `client.email` | obrigatório, email válido |
| `cardNumber` | obrigatório, exatamente 16 dígitos numéricos |
| `cvv` | obrigatório, exatamente 3 dígitos numéricos |

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "externalId": "0e9d4f09-0241-4a6e-84e8-b67b4733996e",
    "status": "pending",
    "amount": 508990,
    "cardLastNumbers": "6063",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
    "client": {
      "id": 3,
      "name": "João Silva",
      "email": "joao@email.com"
    },
    "gateway": {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Gateway 1"
    },
    "products": [
      { "id": 25, "name": "Plano Basic", "amount": 4990, "quantity": 100 },
      { "id": 26, "name": "Plano Pro", "amount": 9990, "quantity": 1 }
    ]
  }
}

 ```

**400 Bad Request**

``` json
{ "message": "One or more products not found" }

 ```

**400 Bad Request**

``` json
{ "message": "All gateways failed" }

 ```

**422 Validation Error**

``` json
{
  "message": "Validation error",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "cardNumber", "message": "The cardNumber must be exactly 16 digits" },
    { "field": "cvv", "message": "The cvv must be exactly 3 digits" }
  ]
}

 ```

- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Lista todas as transações com cliente e gateway. Ordenadas por data decrescente.
    
- Relos permitdas; ADMIN, MANAGER, FINANCE.
    

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "externalId": "0e9d4f09-0241-4a6e-84e8-b67b4733996e",
      "status": "paid",
      "amount": 9990,
      "cardLastNumbers": "6063",
      "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
      "client": { "id": 1, "name": "João Silva", "email": "joao@email.com" },
      "gateway": { "id": 1, "name": "Gateway 1" }
    }
  ]
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidden**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Retorna os detalhes de uma transação com cliente, gateway e produtos.
    
- Roles permitidas: ADMIN, MANAGER, FINANCE.
    

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "externalId": "0e9d4f09-0241-4a6e-84e8-b67b4733996e",
    "status": "paid",
    "amount": 9990,
    "cardLastNumbers": "6063",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
    "client": { "id": 1, "name": "João Silva", "email": "joao@email.com" },
    "gateway": { "id": 1, "name": "Gateway 1" },
    "products": [
      { "id": 1, "name": "Plano Basic", "amount": 4990, "quantity": 2 }
    ]
  }
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidden**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

**404 Not Found**

``` json
{ "message": "Resource not found" }

 ```

- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Realiza o reembolso de uma transação pelo gateway de origem.
    
- Não é possível reembolsar uma transação já reembolsada.
    
- Roles permitidas: ADMIN, FINANCE.
    

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "status": "refunded",
    "amount": 9990,
    "cardLastNumbers": "6063",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T20:57:30.000+00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T21:10:00.000+00:00"
  }
}

 ```

**400 Bad Request**

``` json
{ "message": "Transaction already refunded" }

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidden**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

**404 Not Found**

``` json
{ "message": "Resource not found" }

 ```

item.description:
Rotas Privadas — requerem `Authorization: Bearer {token}` no header.

| Método | Rota | Descrição | Roles |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/clients` | Lista todos os clientes | ADMIN, MANAGER, FINANCE |

> <p >Clientes são criados automaticamente ao realizar uma compra. Não há rota de criação manual.</p>

item.name: Gateways

request.description:
- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Ativa ou desativa um gateway. Alterna o status `isActive` atual.
    
- Gateways inativos são ignorados no fluxo de pagamento.
    
- Roles permitidas: ADMIN.
    

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Gateway 1",
    "isActive": false,
    "priority": 1,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T01:24:20.521+00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-14T02:00:00.000+00:00"
  }
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidde**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

**404 Not Found**

``` json
{ "message": "Resource not found" }

 ```

- Endpoint privado, requer autenticação.
    
- Atualiza a prioridade de execução do gateway. Menor número = maior prioridade.
    
- O campo `priority` é único — não pode haver dois gateways com a mesma prioridade.
    
- Roles permitidas: ADMIN
    

---

| Campo | Rules |
| --- | --- |
| `priority` | obrigatório, inteiro positivo, mínimo 1, único |

---

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Gateway 1",
    "isActive": true,
    "priority": 5,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T01:24:20.521+00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-14T02:00:00.000+00:00"
  }
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{ "message": "Unauthorized" }

 ```

**403 Forbidden**

``` json
{ "message": "Access denied" }

 ```

**404 Not Found**

``` json
{ "message": "Resource not found" }

 ```

**409 Conflict**

``` json
{ "message": "Priority already in use" }

 ```

**422 Validation Error**

``` json
{
  "message": "Validation error",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "priority", "message": "The priority must be a positive number" }
  ]
}

 ```

item.description:
Rotas Privadas — requerem `Authorization: Bearer {token}` no header.

| Método | Rota | Descrição | Roles |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PATCH | `/gateways/:id/toggle` | Ativa ou desativa um gateway | ADMIN |
| PATCH | `/gateways/:id/priority` | Atualiza a prioridade de execução | ADMIN |

---
